reviews.review_description:
One of the most underwhelming VR experiences I've had. Some of the reviews must be fake. A case where I'd want my money back.

- extremely simple graphics (but at least art style not all over the place)
- the interactions are slow and very clunky
- multiple times interactions failed completely or seemed to fail but then worked. No clear feedback. E.g. engine block didn't lock at first, newspaper in the bookshelf could not be pulled out at all, somehow finding the blueprints wasn't necessary in my playthrough, light switch could not be pulled for 30 seconds but then worked..
- bad camera adjustment in tight real world spaces. Worst case: something can't be reached bc real world object is in the way and position can't be adjusted.
- horrible and empty driving scene. Only the houses look nice.
- a lot of important and interesting historical context is missing

The main voice actress was great. The short movie nice. Some other details good.

While the drive itself was important, overplaying its importance ("paved the way to the age of invention") degrades the actual achievement.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback. I’m sorry the experience didn’t land for you.

Just to clarify, Mrs Benz is a free, short-form narrative VR experience rather than a full-length game. Our aim was to create an atmospheric introduction to Bertha Benz’s historic journey, focusing on storytelling and performance.

We do appreciate you highlighting the voice performance and film sequence, we’ll be sure to pass that along to the team. Feedback like this helps us improve future updates and experiences.

reviews.review_description: On one hand, the story is interesting, and there are a few nice environmental details, such as a newspaper you can (try to) read. On the other hand, it’s almost impossible to turn the newspaper without painfully contorting your hand — and even then, your virtual hand covers half the text, so you have to twist your other hand to read the rest. Unfortunately, the app tells very little about Bertha Benz herself, apart from the fact that she drove the automobile. It doesn’t even mention her tribulations or resourcefulness during that journey. There’s almost no interactivity, and the experience is incredibly short. I think Bertha Benz deserved better.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing and for sharing your thoughtful feedback. ⭐

This experience was designed as a short narrative VR piece focused on introducing players to Bertha Benz’s historic journey, but we really appreciate your notes on the interaction design and historical detail. Feedback like this is extremely helpful as we continue developing immersive storytelling projects.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts. 🚗✨

reviews.review_description: A gift from the gods. Sterling Premium platinum champagne grade excellence. Top tier.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the incredible praise! ❤️ ⭐

We’re so happy you enjoyed the experience. The team put a lot of care into bringing Bertha Benz’s story to life in VR, and it means a lot to hear feedback like this. 🚗 ✨

reviews.review_title: Fascinating experience. I learned a lot
reviews.review_description: This was my first time experiencing a VR interactive piece like this and I am very impressed. A wonderful immersive way to learn about a pioneering woman I had never heard of before. The game is intuitive to an inexperienced player like me and Daisy Ridley brings warmth and intelligence to the character with her portrayal. I would definitely recommend this to VR users.
such a lovely experience in an exciting and beautiful environment. The score was stunning and I really enjoyed learning about Bertha, as I was getting to be her! So effective.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! ❤️
We’re really glad you enjoyed stepping into Bertha’s story and the environment we created. It means a lot to hear that the music and perspective resonated with you. 🚗 ✨

reviews.review_description: I loved pirate queen and when u saw this was coming out from the same developers I was willing to buy it, but it's free wow , great graphics with some cool game mechanics, only thing I was a bit disappointed in was the teleport only which I'm not a fan of and the standing only,  games more relaxing like this I prefer to walk around with locomotion and sit to enjoy the story and adventure,  but otherwise I've always enjoyed a immersive story campaign like this and pirate queen. Good work with beautiful narration and hands on builds for us players.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and for the thoughtful feedback! 🙌 We’re really glad you enjoyed the story, narration, and interactive elements. Thanks again for supporting both this and The Pirate Queen. ⭐✨

reviews.review_description: I can't fault this. The art style and environment was literally like being in 1888 germany and it's such an interesting narrative that seems to be criminally forgotten

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words! ⭐
We’re thrilled you enjoyed the environment and storytelling. Bringing overlooked historical stories like Bertha Benz’s into immersive media is something we care deeply about. ❤️

reviews.review_description: Bit late on this one but pleased I found the time to play. We really do need more projects like this in this space highlighting incredible people in history. Thank you Singer Studios!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing! ❤️
We completely agree — there are so many incredible stories from history that deserve to be experienced in new ways. We’re really glad Bertha’s story resonated with you. ⭐

reviews.review_description: Heard about this through a friend and thought I'd check it out, as it's not something I'd usually think to get myself, and so glad I did. Really enjoyed the narrative element and I felt so immersed in the environment. Getting to drive the world's first car was a fun touch and great to hear a star like Daisy Ridley finding new ways to share her talent. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking it out and for the kind words! 🙏 We’re thrilled you enjoyed the narrative side of the experience and felt immersed in the world. And yes - Daisy brought something really special to the role! 🎧✨

reviews.review_description: Been following the release of this project since The Pirate Queen and it lived up! Thank you Singer Studios for continuing to highlight these amazing women. Not surprised Daisy wanted to do it either. The dedication to bringing these women and their experiences to life is wonderful and they do it so well!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for following the journey from The Pirate Queen! ❤️ It means a lot to hear that the experience lived up to your expectations. We’re passionate about bringing the stories of remarkable women like Bertha Benz to life, and we’re so glad it resonated with you. Daisy brought such heart to the role as well. ⭐✨ Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Big fan of what Singer Studios is doing with immersive narratives. Another story of an impressive woman left behind in history. As a big fan of history and tech, this did everything I wanted it to and more. A seamless blend of innovation and storytelling. Hats off to everyone involved!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the continued support! ❤️

reviews.review_description: This is so cool! I saw Daisy Ridley was getting involved with VR and I was in. This is such an interesting story and to get to be so interactive in a historically accurate environment is something else! Defo check this out

developer_response.body: Thank you! 🙌 We’re so glad you enjoyed exploring Bertha Benz’s story in VR. Creating historically rich environments that people can step into is something we care deeply about. ✨

reviews.review_description: Ahhh I've been so excited for this! An inspiring tribute to a pioneering woman whose story deserves the spotlight:) Brilliantly told and beautifully rendered. Women have always been amazing, spread the word! Well done everyone!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! ⭐ We’re so glad Bertha Benz’s story resonated with you. She truly was a pioneering woman, and it means a lot to us to help bring stories like hers into the spotlight. ❤️

reviews.review_description: Love this so much. Trailblazer is a truly immersive triumph :) Amazing work Singer Studios , who continually redefine what it means to step into the past. Such beautiful environments and stunning storytelling.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 💫 We’re really grateful for your support and thrilled you enjoyed the environments and storytelling. It means a lot to the team. 🙏

reviews.review_description: Wow! What a beautiful experience. So exciting getting to see a company bringing the lives and history of these incredible woman for us all to experience. So grateful for these kinds of projects and so excited to see where this kind of VR continues to grow!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the lovely review! 💫 Bertha Benz was an extraordinary pioneer and we’re so glad the experience resonated with you. It means a lot to hear that her story connected with you through VR. 🚗

reviews.review_description: This was so cool! Really enjoyed getting to build the car and had never heard about Bertha Benz so that was a bonus. Daisy Ridley is great and the score is awesome. Nice one!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! 🙌 We love hearing that players discover Bertha Benz’s story through the experience. Glad you enjoyed building the car and the score as well!

reviews.review_description: IM IN AWE! Singer Studios has set a new benchmark for immersive storytelling. I really loved this! Highly recommend checking it out. Such a beautiful experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the incredibly kind words! 🌟 We’re really happy you enjoyed the experience and the storytelling. Your support means a lot to the whole team. 🙏

reviews.review_description: Wow wow wow, what a breathtaking journey through history! And Daisy Ridley brings Bertha Benz’s story to life with incredible power and grace. Congrats to these developers!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! ⭐ We’re delighted that Bertha’s journey inspired you. Daisy did an incredible job bringing her story to life, and the team worked hard to create an experience that celebrates her remarkable journey. ❤️

reviews.review_description: I saw an article saying there's going to be film made about this from the same company that developed it so thought I'd have a look. This will be a great topic, very much looking forward to seeing it on the big screen.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for checking out the experience! ⭐ We’re really glad you enjoyed it. Bertha Benz’s story is an incredible one, and it’s exciting to see it reaching audiences in different ways. ❤️🚗 We really appreciate the support! ✨

reviews.review_description: Daisy Ridley’s performance is captivating, and the immersive design makes you feel every mile of Bertha’s journey. Really cool idea

developer_response.body: Thank you! ❤️ We’re so happy you enjoyed the experience and Daisy Ridley’s performance. She brought such warmth and strength to Bertha’s story, and it’s wonderful to hear that it connected with you. ✨🚗

reviews.review_description: This is such a cool concept for VR. haven't come across this kind of narrative VR too much but definitely going to look into it more, I could drive!

developer_response.body: Haha love this! 😄 Glad you enjoyed getting behind the wheel of the world’s first car. Thanks so much for trying the experience and sharing your thoughts. 🚗✨

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed this! Give it a download if you like immersive narrative games and fab performances

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the recommendation! ⭐
We’re really happy you enjoyed the narrative experience and performances. Your support means a lot to the team. ❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! ⭐ We’re thrilled you enjoyed Daisy’s performance — she brought so much emotion and depth to Bertha’s story. Really glad the experience resonated with you. ❤️🚗

reviews.review_description: loved this, well done to the team shining a light on these interactive stories

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for playing! 🙏 We’re really glad you enjoyed the experience and the interactive storytelling. Bringing stories like Bertha Benz’s to life in VR means a lot to our team. 🚗✨
